mapper.select:
select c.id, c.name, c.avatar, CASE c.gender WHEN '男' THEN 1 WHEN '女' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as gender, c.age, c.score, c.orders, c.comments, c.score as rating, c.certified, c.qualified, c.experience, c.tags, c.services, c.intro, c.is_online, c.create_time, c.update_time, CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_favorite from companion_profile c left join favorite f on f.item_id = c.id and f.user_id = #{userId}
and c.gender =
'男' '女' ''
and JSON_CONTAINS(c.services, #{service}, '$')
and (c.name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.intro like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by c.score desc
order by c.orders desc
order by c.create_time desc
limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from companion_profile c
and c.gender =
'男' '女' ''
and JSON_CONTAINS(c.services, #{service}, '$')
and (c.name like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.intro like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select c.id, c.name, c.avatar, CASE c.gender WHEN '男' THEN 1 WHEN '女' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END as gender, c.age, c.score, c.orders, c.comments, c.score as rating, c.certified, c.qualified, c.experience, c.tags, c.services, c.intro, c.is_online, c.create_time, c.update_time, CASE WHEN f.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as is_favorite from companion_profile c left join favorite f on f.item_id = c.id and f.user_id = #{userId} where c.id = #{id}
select id, user_id, user_name, user_avatar, score, content, images, time from order_review where companion_id = #{companionId} order by time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from order_review where companion_id = #{companionId}
mapper.insert: insert into favorite (user_id, item_id, name, avatar, description, time) values (#{favorite.userId}, #{favorite.itemId}, #{favorite.name}, #{favorite.avatar}, #{favorite.description}, now())
mapper.delete: delete from favorite where user_id = #{userId} and item_id = #{itemId}
